findings.title: Trades exit long before the signal's validated horizon
findings.evidence: Median hold = 25 min vs designed 390 min (6% of design). The model predicts 390-minute-ahead returns; exiting earlier means the validated edge never has time to materialize — the live system trades a DIFFERENT strategy than the one backtested.
findings.recommendation: Disable or drastically slow any exit that can fire inside the signal horizon (e.g., require reversal confirmation over 30-60 bars, or gate reversal exits on a fresh opposite-direction pred_return that clears the cost threshold — not ensemble flicker).

findings.title: 'signal_reversal' exits dominate (59% of trades) but were never backtested
findings.evidence: 37/63 trades exit via 'signal_reversal' (total PnL +128.11, win rate 49%). This exit path is not part of the validated design — the backtest edge does not apply to these trades.
findings.recommendation: Either backtest 'signal_reversal' exits explicitly or remove them. An unvalidated exit path invalidates the whole strategy's expectancy estimate.

findings.title: Risk exits destroy more than profit exits earn
findings.evidence: stop_loss: 5 trades / -567.31; trailing_stop: 6 trades / -242.59; take_profit: 1 trades / +495.59. The win side cannot pay for the loss side — classic sign that targets are unreachable at the actual holding horizon while stops remain fully reachable.
findings.recommendation: Re-derive stop/target multiples from the realized holding-period volatility (not daily ATR applied to minute-scale holds), or fix the holding horizon first and re-measure.

findings.title: Profit factor 0.89 — the book loses money as configured
findings.evidence: n=63, win rate 47.6%, avg win +37.89 vs avg loss -41.29, total PnL -143.32. Losses run larger than wins with a sub-50% hit rate: there is no positive expectancy at the current (execution-truncated) horizon.
findings.recommendation: Do not tune around this — fix the design-conformance findings first, then re-measure on a frozen configuration.

findings.title: 6 tickers repeatedly lose money (-605.13 combined)
findings.evidence: Tickers with ≥3 trades and negative total PnL: AMD (-208), WDC (-121), AVGO (-99), SMCI (-82), ARM (-57), SNDK (-37).
findings.recommendation: Audit why the per-ticker live-IC gate has not excluded these names (tickers_ic_blocked is empty). Tighten the gate: require positive rolling live IC before a ticker is tradeable, not just 'not strongly negative'.

findings.title: Only 63 closed trades in 60 days — expectancy estimates are noisy
findings.evidence: With n=63, a true 55% win-rate strategy can easily show <50% observed. Any strategy verdict needs ≥100 trades at a FIXED configuration — constant parameter churn resets the sample.
findings.recommendation: Freeze one configuration for a full evaluation window. Stop changing entry/exit parameters mid-sample.
